summary: Retention repair is implemented and verified. H1, M2, M3, L1, and L2 are fixed; M1 is reduced for the primary runCodexExec path with bounded output and truncation metadata. A fresh verifier edge-case finding in proof approval-record failure was fixed by superseding the waiting approval. Overall verdict is WARN because bootstrap/Telegram helper output buffering remains a documented residual risk and pnpm happytg verify reports environment warnings with exit code 0.
residual_risks: Bootstrap and Telegram helper command wrappers still use local stdout/stderr strings outside the primary runCodexExec daemon path.
pnpm happytg verify is WARN due to Codex websocket 403 fallback, public Caddy Mini App identity mismatch, and pairing/daemon flow not completed while local services are already running.
